title: juncus howellii
intro: Juncus howellii, also known as Howell's rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Juncus howellii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
